posts.title: President Trump says he's requesting a rehearing of the birthright citizenship case Trump v Barbara.

quotedTweet.content: 🚨 The Supreme Court ruled that the Fourteenth Amendment guarantees birthright citizenship to children born in the United States, including those whose parents are in the country unlawfully or only temporarily, striking down President Trump's executive order.

twitter.content:
President Trump has indicated that the United States will seek rehearing of the Supreme Court's ruling on birthright citizenship.   

Rule 44 allows 25 days to seek rehearing. It requires the support of at least one Justice from the majority, and is rarely granted.

posts.raw_content:
Thanks to the SCOTUS decision on birthright citizenship, our enemies are SHEEPDIPPING their children with dual US citizenship and a citizenship of their home country.   These children potentially become future spies, lobbyists, foreign soldiers, adverse diplomats, exploiting their US citizenship to degrade the United States in various ways.  Mostly economic but also administrative, legal.  

Similar to the Venezuelan drug boats, this SCOTUS decision necessarily creates a motivation for the US Government--in the name of national security--to prophylactically eliminate any futurespies by bombing  commercial for-profit (Chinese / foreign adversary) materinity ships that meander into the United States coastal waters in order to have anchor babies.

Alternatively, to SEIZE these boats, and then abduct the children into CPS system, making them wards of the US government, and then putting them into the foster adoption system, because if they go back home to their adversary country, they will be indoctrinated  into an enemy system.  ***This is done by declaring their foreign citizen parents to be illegally tresspassing into US waters and therefore the child is born to illegal alien CRIMINALS***.  We already do this with mexican illegals in america, so really its the same activity of ICE / CBP, but done on the waters.  If we DONT do it to Chinese, then we are being racist to Latinos.  Got it?  Ok.

What we need then, is a LAW that makes the dual citizenship illegal. 

They cannot have it both ways.

If they do, our country is going to have zero national security 


ZERO

Those that are in the US already with dual citizenship, they have a choice.  By default, the additional citizenships are CANCELED.  So if you do nothing, you lose your other citizenships. 

You have a window of time to stop this.  I think a YEAR to get your shit in order.  Give them a YEAR to figure out which citizenship they want.

If they've been in America for 10 yrs, they can stay permanently, on a Green Card visa, which is what they get in exchange for giving up their US citizenship for a foreign citizenship.

The NSA and 17+ intelligence agencies are directed to Surveil these people at a 2-5x higher priority than people who were born here in America, to TWO AMERICAN CITIZENS.  

So if we can get the R's to do their actual job in Congress, maybe we can visit this issue.
posts.author: 5DchessWatch
posts.title: Here is how you fix the bad SCOTUS birthright decision:  Create a LAW that bans dual citizenship.  You cannot re-enter US without first renouncing your other citizenship.  No grandfathering in.  If you're a US resident w/ multi-citizenship, you can choose which one you have.
